title: Ora Kannaal Lyrics Attu
stanzas: <div>Ora Kannaal Ennai Paathaale Song Lyrics Attu

Oara kannaal ennai paathaale
yedho yedho ennai
maayam seithaale
enakkul kadhal thandhaale
thandhaale thandhaale(2)

urugudhe manam ye ke ye
parakkuren vinnil ye ke ke
malarudhe mugam  ye ke ye
vandhadhae kadhal ye ye ye..

Oara kannaal ennai paathaale
yedho yedho maayam seithaale

Vidhiyaal unnai kandaen
vizhiyil unnai konden
iravu pagalaaga
imaigal moodaamal
unnai naan paarkiren

nodigal noolaagudhe
enakkul poo pookkudhe
yaarum illaadha nerangal kooda
un kural kaetkudhe.

irundhum irundhum
unnai paarkaadha nerangal
ayyaiyo adhu yeno
thee moottuthae.

nadai or vidham aaguthe
mozhiyum thadumaarudhe
ulagam ariyaadha
kuzhandhai aagindren
nee en arugil nindraal

imaiya kulir kaattrai pol
ullukkul uruvaaguthe
ooril illaadha vetkam
unargindren ne en
edhiril vandhaal

medhuvaa medhuvaa
en paerai nee sonnaale
azhagagum adhukooda
nee sollvathaal

thaniyaa thaniyaa
naan irundhaalum thaniyaaga
naanillai enakkulle
nee vandhathaal

Oara kannaal ennai paathaale
yedho yedho
maayam seithaale
enakkul kadhal thandhaale
thandhaale thandhaale

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ora Kannaal'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and enchantment, highlighting the feelings that arise when one sees their beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Attu'?

In Attu, this song plays during a romantic sequence, showcasing the protagonist's feelings for their love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung and composed by Bobo Shashi, showcasing his talent in both singing and music direction.

When was 'Ora Kannaal' released?

'Ora Kannaal' was released on March 15, 2017, as part of the movie Attu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Ora Kannaal', the protagonist expresses their profound feelings of love and attraction, evoking a sense of longing and enchantment. The melody beautifully complements the romantic theme, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments in the movie Attu. The lyrics convey a deep emotional connection, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of romance, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ora Kannaal Lyrics Attu is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Bobo Shashi's soulful voice and enchanting music, this song creates a dreamy atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Dive into the world of Attu and experience the magic of love through its captivating melodies.
stanzaMeanings: When you look at me with your one eye, something magical happens to me. It gives me love, love, love.
My heart melts, I fly in the sky, and your flower-like face comes to me, love, love, love.
When you look at me with your one eye, something magical happens.
I saw you in the light, I held you in my sight, day and night, without closing my eyes, I keep looking at you.
My eyes are like threads, flowers bloom inside me, even in moments when no one is around, I hear your voice.
My heart, it is because of you that it gets sweet every day.
Even when you are here, there are moments when I can't see you, oh, it feels like fire is burning.
This is what love feels like.
In a certain way, words are not enough, I feel like a child who doesn't understand the world when you stand near me.
Like the cool breeze of the morning, it takes shape inside me, I feel the emptiness of the world when you come to me.
When you say my name, it becomes beautiful, and when you say it, it becomes even more beautiful.
Even if I am alone, I am not lonely because you have come inside me.
This is what love feels like.
When you look at me with your one eye, something magical happens to me. It gives me love, love, love.
